# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: users-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: users-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: users-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: users-service
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: users-service
          image: example.com/microservices/users-service:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: users-service
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /live
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: users-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: users-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: users-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: orders-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: orders-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: orders-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: orders-service
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: orders-service
          image: example.com/microservices/orders-service:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: orders-service
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /live
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: orders-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: orders-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: orders-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payments-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: payments-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: payments-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: payments-service
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: payments-service
          image: example.com/microservices/payments-service:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: payments-service
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /live
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payments-service
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: payments-service
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: payments-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
